conclusions.title: Conclusions
conclusions.subtitle: Executive summary: edge status, PnL drivers and recommended actions
conclusions.edge_tip: True statistical edge. POSITIVE = winning, NEGATIVE = losing.
conclusions.confidence_tip: Depends on trade count, score coverage and replay data.
conclusions.data_quality_tip: GOOD = all clear, POOR = scores missing or inconsistent.
conclusions.balance.loser_heavier: Average loser is {ratio}× the average winner. Win-rate must be ≥ {wr}% to break even.
conclusions.balance.winner_heavier: Average winner is {ratio}× the average loser. With WR ≥ {wr}% the system is profitable.
conclusions.balance.equal: Average winner and loser are equal — PnL depends only on win-rate.
conclusions.recent_markers_tip: Latest marked changes with measured impact (20 trades before vs 20 after).
botlive.title: Bot Live
botlive.subtitle: Real-time bot status: trades, signals and PnL
botlive.summary_tip: Real-time summary of trades executed by the bot. Data refreshes automatically.
botlive.signals_tip: Breakdown of signals: ENTER (executed), SKIP (ignored), BLOCKED (rejected by filters).
botlive.gate_tip: Counters of rejections per entry filter. Replaces the old invisible rejects. Lets you see which filter is blocking entries. Snapshot sent by the bot every ~1 min.
botlive.gate.top_coins: Top coins blocked by SL Viability:
botlive.gate.no_rejects: No SL Viability rejects in this window.
botlive.recent_tip: Most recent trades with gross PnL, fees and net breakdown per operation.
cambios.title: Changes
cambios.subtitle: Events that can change bot behaviour, with before/after impact calculated automatically
cambios.empty: No markers in this period. Create one with the bot's "Mark change" button, or switch mode / accept a proposal.
cambios.col.label: Label
cambios.how_it_works: How it works: each marker compares metrics (WR, expectancy, SL rate, profit factor) of the 20 trades before vs the 20 trades after the event. If there aren't at least 10 trades in a window, it falls back to 6 hours before/after. If the marker has context (coin/side/mode) only those trades are counted. Status is computed via weighted score: IMPROVED if it improves > 10%, WORSENED if it worsens > 10%, otherwise NEUTRAL.
system.title: System
system.subtitle: Technical health, disk, CPU, RAM, connection status
system.disk_tip: Server space used by data, logs and database. An alert triggers above 85%.
system.by_dir_tip: Breakdown of space used by each directory: raw, features, logs, etc.
system.ingestion_tip: Capture metrics: how many events arrive, parquet files, feature-store cache hits. Used to live in a separate 'Capture' tab — merged here to avoid duplication.
features.title: Features
features.subtitle: 48 real-time features per coin
regimes.title: Market Regimes
regimes.subtitle: Current classification: trending, choppy, high vol, quiet
capture.title: Data Capture
capture.subtitle: Events ingested, parquet files, tracked coins
capture.quality_tip: Feature compute metrics and capture-system cache hits.
contract.title: Feature Contract
contract.subtitle: Formal definition of every feature in the system
contract.col.name: Name
daily.title: Daily Report
daily.subtitle: Automatic per-day summary with historical comparison
daily.tip: Automatic daily report. Click a day to see the full detail. Generated on load.
daily.no_activity_body: No trades happened on this day. Once trading runs and positions close, the report will show up here.
common.no_data_yet: No data yet. Will populate once trades close.
common.no_features_yet: No features yet. They arrive once the bot receives market data.
common.no_regimes_yet: No regime data yet. The regime detector needs a few minutes to calibrate.
lab.title: Research Lab
lab.subtitle: Quantitative analysis: metrics, experiments, decisions
lab.tip: Overview of performance with key KPIs and automated system decisions.
lab.score_analysis_tip: Entry-score analysis. Shows how score relates to trade quality.
lab.mode_performance_tip: Comparison across modes: SCALP (aggressive), NORMAL (balanced), SWING (defensive).
lab.config_tip: Impact analysis of every configuration parameter on performance.
lab.rej_tip: Signals the bot detected but rejected. Split by stage: pre-candidate and post-candidate.
lab.cf_tip: Simulation of what would happen with different score thresholds. Helps decide the optimal cutoff.
lab.diag_tip: Full evaluation of every filter for each signal. Surfaces the real bottleneck.
validation.title: Validation
validation.subtitle: Formal tests of changes before applying them to the bot
validation.tip: Formal tests of changes before applying them to the bot. Compares variants against the current baseline.
validation.desc_live: Runs 12 experiments across 3 batches against real trade data
validation.desc_replay: Replay mode: requires 7+ days of captured raw data
research.title: Reports
research.subtitle: Operational reports: by coin, hour, mode, tags
audit.title: Audit
audit.subtitle: Data quality, integrity, automated checks
audit.tip: Automated audit system that verifies data integrity every 5–60 minutes.
audit.checks_tip: Each check runs on its own interval: integration (5m), quality (15m), storage (1h), consistency (6h).
help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Full platform guide — trader-oriented
help.body_notice: Detailed help content is currently in Spanish. English translation coming soon.
shadow.title: Shadow Mode
shadow.subtitle: Config variants evaluated in parallel to the real engine. Zero orders, observation only.
shadow.how_to_read_body: For each variant I measure what would have happened if it had been active in prod during the selected window. For entry-filter variants (e.g. score-62) I cross blocked candidates with real trades and sum the PnL you would have saved or cost. For exit variants (e.g. roi-patient) I sum sim-vs-real deltas of every close. The verdict below is computed automatically — CANDIDATE = ready to apply to the preset, NEUTRAL/POSITIVE = keep measuring, NEGATIVE = do not apply, INSUFFICIENT DATA = sample smaller than 10–20 trades.
shadow.impact_empty: Not enough data yet. Wait for the bot to process a few entries during the selected window.
shadow.active_tip: Each variant evaluates every entry candidate in parallel and stores its decision in hl_shadow_evaluations. Zero impact on prod.
shadow.active_empty: No variants. Use a template below or fill the form.
shadow.col.name: Name
shadow.templates_tip: Click a template to pre-fill the form. You can tweak values before saving.
shadow.new_tip: At least ONE filter or override must be active to save. Renaming during edit renames the variant and all its associated history (evaluations + simulated exits).
shadow.need_filter: ✗ Enable at least one filter or override
shadow.summary_tip: Aggregated per variant over the last N hours. fireRate = % of candidates the variant would have fired. Compare to prod: low fireRate = stricter; high = looser.
shadow.summary_empty: No evaluations yet. Variants only run when prod passes gates and is about to enter.
shadow.decisions_tip: Each row = one variant's decision on a prod candidate. prodFired is always true (we only evaluate when prod enters). Compare would-fire of variant vs prod to spot divergence.
shadow.decisions_empty: No decisions. Wait for the bot to trigger an entry with any active variant.
shadow.exits_tip: Each variant with exit overrides (ROI/SL/TP/maxHold) produces a hypothetical row per real entry. When both sides (variant and real) are evaluated, delta is computed. winRate = % of trades where the variant would have closed better than prod.
shadow.exits_empty: No simulations yet. Create a variant with exit overrides (patient ROI, alternative TP, etc.) and wait for the next bot entry.
shadow.recent_exits_tip: PENDING = variant hasn't closed yet. VARIANT_FIRST = variant closed before prod (sim full). REAL_FIRST = prod closed first (Phase 3 will fill sim with post-close price). BOTH_EVALUATED = comparable delta.
shadow.recent_exits_empty: No rows. Variants with exit overrides materialise when the bot opens a new position.
shadow.delete_body_p1: You are about to delete variant
shadow.delete_warning: ⚠ This action cannot be undone. If you only want to change name or values, use Edit — the history is preserved.
shadow.delete_success: Variant "{name}" deleted. Cleaned {ev} evaluations and {ex} exits.
